channel.title: Missing-Serial-Number on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Missing-Serial-Number on smpaget blog

item.title: If your looking for....
item.description: If you update to Leopard, and wipe the hard disk like i did, and you reload in all your software like i did, Take a note of all you serial numbers before you do it. or you could spend one night searching for the number, and not find it, like i did then down load open office, like I did, then pray you don’t have to open anything written in pages at work the next day, like i prayed, then spend night two going through everything where it should be, and not find it, like i did and then when dispair hits, like I felt it have your wife find it randomly under a pile of stuff, like she did in the living room on the mantel piece, “where you left it, obviously”, like i did on second thoughts it is probably easier to note down the number before you install.
